about.title: Passionate about code and growth
about.bio: I am owedev, a Full Stack developer based in Benin. I design high-performance web platforms, custom B2B SaaS products, and SEO strategies that drive real growth for ambitious startups and businesses.

exp_items.desc: Entrepreneurial tracking platform for 500+ students. React.js/Node.js architecture, secure REST APIs and Agile project management.
Connection platform. Web services integration, SEO optimization and performance (score 90+). Autonomous design and production.
Patient management app: React, Node.js, Express and Clerk authentication. Vercel deployment with CI/CD pipeline.
Long-term partnership on custom website design. Advanced expertise in Divi, CSS customization and UX optimization.

edu_items.desc: Specialization in application development and information systems.
Mastery of Docker, CI/CD, and VPS/Vercel deployment.

testimonials_page.label: Testimonials

items.q: What types of projects do you handle?
items.a: I develop custom web applications (React, Next.js, Node.js), mobile apps (React Native), e-commerce sites, and B2B SaaS solutions.

items.q: What is your preferred tech stack?
items.a: I specialize in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem: React and Next.js on the front end, Node.js and Express on the back end, with MongoDB for data. For mobile, I use React Native.

items.q: How long does it take to build a website?
items.a: It depends on complexity. A showcase site can take 1-2 weeks, while a complex business platform may require 1-3 months.
Yes, absolutely. I support my clients with maintenance packages to ensure security and technical updates.
Yes, I mainly work remotely with clients worldwide.
